scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/copy-runtime-public-assets.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.html';let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace(/ crossorigin(=\"[^\"]*\")?/g,'');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);console.log('stripped crossorigin')"
scripts.release:check: npm run verify:redbull-wheels && npm run build && npm run metadata
scripts.zip: npm run release:check && cd dist && zip -FS -r ../submission.zip . && cd .. && node scripts/capture-release-metadata.mjs --include-zip
